name: Exile
description: Left in the cold, no one remembers your name, or at least they have tried to erase it from memory. Your blood runs deep with a curse no history has ever recalled. You have grown tired of this exile, whether you succumb to this curse or remove it, this exile will end.

feats.name: Pass the Curse
feats.description: You would rather sell your soul then let death take you. Once per **Respite**, when an attack would **critically** hit you, you turn it into **regular** hit.

_review: attribute_bonus was "+1 Body" — mapped to brawn; verify Brawn vs Finesse
